level_signals: 2–4 years of experience in a product-related role
This role suits someone early in their PM career who loves to learn, collaborate, and build meaningful solutions

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 2–4 years of experience in a product-related role (e.g. Product Manager, startup operator, founder, or product analyst).
must_haves.qualifier: product-related role including PM, startup operator, founder, or product analyst

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Proven track record of building or launching products end-to-end.
Experience collaborating closely with engineering and design teams to deliver value quickly.
Excellent written and verbal communication; able to explain complex ideas simply and effectively
Comfortable operating in fast-moving, ambiguous environments.
Familiarity using AI in your day-to-day product work, such as prototyping, research, or analysis.
Experience in an early-stage or high-growth startup environment.

scope.surface: Open finance network products; tools enabling financial account connectivity for developers and end users
scope.business_model: B2B2C — developer-facing platform/API powering consumer financial apps
primary_metrics_inferred: Product adoption and usage by developers
Reliability and quality of financial connectivity
core_responsibilities: Own a product area: define problems, write clear requirements, and drive execution with cross-functional teams.
Shape the roadmap using data, feedback, and market signals.
Collaborate with Engineering and Design to deliver intuitive, high-quality experiences.
Use metrics and user insights to measure and improve outcomes.
Communicate clearly, align stakeholders, and guide decisions.
Act with a founder mindset–simplify, move fast, and embrace feedback.
Learn continuously and help raise the bar for Plaid's products and culture.

compensation.equity_form: equity and/or commission dependent on position offered

green_flags: Explicitly early-career friendly: 'This role suits someone early in their PM career'
Encourages applications even if experience doesn't fully match
Clear product mission tied to a well-known, scaled fintech platform (Plaid)
Acknowledges lived experience as qualifying signal alongside work experience
Equity mentioned as part of compensation
red_flags: No compensation range disclosed despite detailed benefit language
Location not specified for this role — cities_listed inferred from HQ mention; remote eligibility unclear
Visa sponsorship not addressed in JD
Startup experience listed as a required qualification but Plaid is a mature company — potential culture mismatch signal
